trigger: FAA publishes final Part 108 BVLOS rule in Federal Register
current_status: Not final as of 2026-06-25; still in rulemaking. Latest FR action = comment-period reopening (FR Doc 2026-01644, pub 2026-01-28; Docket FAA-2025-1908), closed 2026-02-11. EO 2026-02-01 deadline passed unmet; presumptive right-of-way / electronic conspicuity is the open sticking point
what_changes_if_trigger_fires: Upgrade from regulatory speculation to fact; re-score drone RIDs (esp. RID-067/070) if final rule includes DAA/C2/ADSP requirements
quarterly_search_query: site:federalregister.gov FAA Part 108 BVLOS final rule

trigger: USTR announces post-June-23-2027 Section 301 semiconductor/SiC tariff rate
current_status: Rate not announced as of 2026-06-25. Per FR Doc 2025-23912 (pub 2025-12-29) the semiconductor/SiC rate is 0% now, increasing 2027-06-23 to "a rate to be announced not fewer than 30 days prior" (~2027-05-24). Additional to the existing 50% Section 301 semiconductor tariff
what_changes_if_trigger_fires: Update SiC & China-semiconductor component economics once the numeric rate is announced

trigger: da Vinci force-feedback evidence upgraded by powered clinical-outcomes RCT
current_status: Not met as of 2026-06-25. Evidence remains preclinical/company-supported + small pilots. One randomized trial exists (ClinicalTrials.gov NCT07247175, Samsung Medical Center, 60-pt RARP) but primary endpoints are traction force & instrument path length, NOT powered patient outcomes; NCT06879912 (Intuitive) is observational. ~43% force reduction (2.40->1.71 N) is ex-vivo/model
what_changes_if_trigger_fires: Upgrade ONLY if a powered RCT with patient-outcome primary endpoints supports benefit (not just force reduction on models)
quarterly_search_query: ClinicalTrials.gov da Vinci 5 force feedback randomized patient outcomes RCT

trigger: JEDEC/HBM roadmap changes revive near-term (pre-2029) D2W hybrid-bonding demand
current_status: Not met as of 2026-06-25; trend is FURTHER POSTPONEMENT. JESD270-4 (2025-04-16) set HBM4 height 775um (microbumps continue); 2026 press indicates JEDEC weighing ~825-900um for HBM4E (delays hybrid bonding). Consensus: full HBM hybrid bonding at HBM5 ~2029-2030 (Counterpoint via Seoul Econ Daily). Samsung sampling 16-Hi HBM4 hybrid-bonded ~10% yield = watch, not pull
official_source_to_monitor: JEDEC; IEEE; SEMI; IRDS; Semiconductor Engineering
score_fields_affected: TRL timing; customer pain; decision status
what_changes_if_trigger_fires: Revisit RID-042 (and RID-041 metrology) only if a published JEDEC standard or major-vendor commitment pulls D2W hybrid bonding into HBM volume before ~2029
quarterly_search_query: JEDEC HBM5 HBM4E hybrid bonding die-to-wafer stack height roadmap 2029

trigger: FDA/organ-on-chip regulatory change creates direct OoC procurement/qualification demand (RID-086)
current_status: Advancing, not binding, as of 2026-06-25. FDA DRAFT NAM guidance issued 2026-03-18 (FR Doc 2026-05390; Docket FDA-2025-D-6131; comments closed 2026-05-18) - framework only, no mandate. FDA Modernization Act 3.0: S.355 passed Senate by unanimous consent 2025-12-16; House H.R.2821 advanced E&C Health Subcommittee, not enacted. ISTAND ongoing (Emulate Liver-Chip accepted; first in-silico DDT accepted 2026-06-03). No general acceptance of OoC data in lieu of animal models finalized
score_fields_affected: regulatory tailwind; demand pull; evidence strength; decision status
what_changes_if_trigger_fires: Lift RID-086 off 'watch' ONLY on a FINAL FDA guidance/rule or enacted Mod Act 3.0 that creates direct OoC qualification/procurement demand (not draft/aspirational)
quarterly_search_query: site:fda.gov OR site:congress.gov FDA Modernization Act 3.0 organ-on-chip microphysiological NAM guidance final
